01 March 2026 Military News

Operations

News Reports

Current Operations

    Operation Epic Fury / Operation Roaring Lion | Operation True Promise 4

  • Operation Epic Fury Update CENTCOM 01 Mar 2026 -- As of 9:30 am ET, March 1, three U.S. service members have been killed in action and five are seriously wounded as part of Operation Epic Fury.
  • CENTCOM confirms US troops killed in Iran's retaliatory strikes Press TV 01 Mar 2026 -- The US military has confirmed that three American troops were killed and five others seriously wounded in Iranian attacks on American bases in the region.

  • Israel, Iran Exchange New Strikes After Khamenei Death RFE/RL 01 Mar 2026 -- Israel pounded locations across Iran on the second day of a joint attack by Tel Aviv and Washington, as Tehran retaliated, firing missiles at targets around the Persian Gulf. US officials said at least three US military personnel were killed.
  • Attacks On Shipping Raise Fears For Global Oil Supplies Amid Iran Conflict RFE/RL 01 Mar 2026 -- Cellphone footage showing tongues of flame and thick, black smoke billowing from a ship in the Strait of Hormuz is an ominous image underlining fears of disruption to global oil supplies amid the US and Israeli conflict with Iran.
  • Israel, Iran Launch New Strikes After Death Of Khamenei RFE/RL 01 Mar 2026 -- Following the death of Iranian Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, Israel continued to pound sites in Iran on the second day of a massive joint attack by Tel Aviv and Washington on the Islamic republic, while Tehran fired back in retaliation.

  • IRGC: Latest waves of Op. True Promise 4 resulted in tanker strikes, base shutdowns, heavy casualties Press TV 01 Mar 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) has announced the achievements of the latest waves of its Operation True Promise 4 in retaliation to the Israeli regime's and the US's unprovoked aggression against the Islamic Republic.
  • IRGC strikes USS Abraham Lincoln aircraft carrier with volley of ballistic missiles Press TV 01 Mar 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) says it has targeted the US aircraft carrier USS Abraham Lincoln with four ballistic missiles.
  • IRGC launches largest barrage of missile strikes at Israeli occupied territories Press TV 01 Mar 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) announced the largest wave of retaliatory attacks against the Israeli-occupied territories on the second day of the joint US-Israeli war of aggression against the Islamic Republic.
  • Largescale jet, drone attacks carried out against US, Zionist targets: Iran Army Press TV 01 Mar 2026 -- The Iranian Army has announced that its forces carried out a massive drone attack against American and Zionist targets.
  • IRGC Says Launched Strikes on 3 US, UK Tankers in Persian Gulf, Strait of Hormuz Sputnik 01 Mar 2026 -- Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) said on Sunday that it had launched missile strikes against three US ans UK tankers in the Persian Gulf and the Strait of Hormuz.
  • Iran's IRGC Says It Launched 4 Ballistic Missiles at US Aircraft Carrier Sputnik 01 Mar 2026 -- Tehran launched four ballistic missile strikes on the US aircraft carrier USS Abraham Lincoln, the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) said on Sunday.
  • Iran Bans Entry to Persian Gulf for US Ships - Senior Iranian Official Sputnik 01 Mar 2026 -- Iran banned the entry to the Persian Gulf for US ships, senior Iranian official Mohsen Rezaei said on Sunday.
  • Iran Confirms Death of Chief of General Staff, Defense Minister - Reports Sputnik 01 Mar 2026 -- Iran confirmed the death of Chief of the General Staff of the Iranian Armed Forces Abdolrahim Mousavi and Defense Minister Aziz Nasirzadeh, the IRNA state new agency reported on Sunday.
  • IRGC Announces 'Most Brutal Offensive' in History of Iranian Armed Forces Sputnik 01 Mar 2026 -- Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC, the elite unit of the armed forces) announced the beginning of "the most brutal offensive operation in the history of the country's armed forces" after confirming the death of Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.

  • Statement by Prime Minister Netanyahu Israel - Prime Minister 01 Mar 2026 -- "We have eliminated the tyrant Khamenei and dozens of senior figures of the oppressive regime. Our forces are now striking at the heart of Tehran with increasing intensity, set to escalate further in the coming days."

  • Iran's Supreme Leader Is Dead. Who Will Succeed Him? It's Complicated. RFE/RL 01 Mar 2026 -- The death of Iran's supreme leader - Ayatollah Ali Khamenei - sent shock waves across the Middle East. Now the question has turned to who will replace him.
  • Iranian State Television Confirms Death of Country's Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei Sputnik 01 Mar 2026 -- Iran's Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei has been killed in attacks by Israel and the United States, Iranian state television confirmed.
  • Ali Khamenei, Iran's Supreme Leader, Killed RFE/RL 01 Mar 2026 -- Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, Iran's spiritual leader and highest authority who led the country for almost four decades, was killed during US and Israeli air strikes on February 28 at the age of 86.
  • Iranian State Media Confirm Khamenei's Death After US, Israeli Air Strikes RFE/RL 01 Mar 2026 -- Iranian state media confirmed early on March 1 that Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei had been killed amid US and Israeli air strikes a day earlier, hours after US President Donald Trump reported the death on his social media platform.
  • Leader of the Islamic Revolution martyred in cowardly Israeli-American aggression Press TV 01 Mar 2026 -- Leader of the Islamic Revolution, Ayatollah Seyyed Ali Khamenei, has been martyred in the American-Israeli aggression against the Islamic Republic of Iran.
  • Ayatollah Khamenei martyred in US-Israeli attack IRNA 01 Mar 2026 -- The Leader of the Islamic Revolution, Ayatollah Seyyed Ali Khameni, has been martyred following an attack by the Israeli and US regimes.

  • Ahmad Vahidi Appointed Commander of Iran's IRGC - Reports Sputnik 01 Mar 2026 -- The Iranian Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) has appointed Ahmad Vahidi, who previously served as an advisor, to the position of commander, the Iranian news agency Khabar Online reported.
  • Iran sees no limits in defending itself after Leader's 'dangerous' assassination: FM Press TV 01 Mar 2026 -- Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi says the assassination of Leader of the Islamic Revolution, Ayatollah Seyyed Ali Khamenei, was a "very dangerous and unprecedented" move, stressing that Iran is bound by no limits in defending itself.
  • Iranian armed forces to pulverize US bases across the region: Pezeshkian Press TV 01 Mar 2026 -- Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian has warned that the country will not hesitate to destroy the military bases of the enemies in the region following a US-Israeli attack that assassinated Leader of the Islamic Revolution, Ayatollah Seyyed Ali Khamenei.
  • Enemy will take dream of enslaving the Iranian nation to grave: Army chief Press TV 01 Mar 2026 -- Iran's Army Commander Major General Amir Hatami says the Iranian armed forces are united and determined to counter the US-Israeli aggression, vowing that the enemy "will take the dream of enslaving the Iranian nation to the grave."
  • Assassination of Ayatollah Khamenei 'open war against Muslims': Pezeshkian Press TV 01 Mar 2026 -- Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian says the assassination of the Leader of the Islamic Revolution, Ayatollah Seyyed Ali Khamenei, is a declaration of an "open war" against Muslims, particularly Shias, across the world.
  • Qalibaf to US, Israel: We will deal such painful blows that you will beg for mercy Press TV 01 Mar 2026 -- Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Baqer Qalibaf has strongly denounced the assassination of Leader of the Islamic Revolution Ayatollah Seyyed Ali Khamenei in a US-Israeli airstrike, vowing that the country's armed forces will deliver such painful retaliatory blows that the enemies will beg for mercy.
  • Profile: Maj. Gen. Abdolrahim Mousavi, the martyred Chief of Staff of Iran's Armed Forces Press TV 01 Mar 2026
  • Profile: Major General Mohammad Pakpour, the martyred IRGC commander-in-chief Press TV 01 Mar 2026
  • Iran's government declares 40 days of mourning over Leader's martyrdom Press TV 01 Mar 2026 -- The Iranian government declared 40 days of mourning and 7 days of public holidays over the martyrdom of Leader of the Islamic Revolution Seyyed Ali Khamenei in terrorist US-Israeli strikes.
  • American criminals and Israeli regime will 'regret' war of aggression against Iran: General Staff Press TV 01 Mar 2026 -- The General Staff of Iran's Armed Forces and Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters have warned the United States and the Israeli regime that they will "regret" the new war of aggression against the Islamic Republic.
  • Iran's Defense Council secretary, IRGC chief assassinated in US-Israeli strikes Press TV 01 Mar 2026 -- Ali Shamkhani, the secretary of Iran's Defense Council and a senior adviser to the late Leader of the Islamic Revolution Ayatollah Seyyed Ali Khamenei, and Chief Commander of the Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) Major General Mohammad Pakpour have been assassinated in airstrikes by criminal US-Israeli forces.
  • Iran to continue acting in self-defense until enemy's aggression ends: UN envoy Press TV 01 Mar 2026 -- Iran's permanent ambassador to the United Nations has vehemently denounced the fresh and unprovoked Israeli-American war on the Islamic Republic, asserting that the country will continue to act in self-defense until the end of the unlawful aggression.

  • Deadly bombing of Iran primary school 'a grave violation of humanitarian law': UNESCO UN News 01 Mar 2026 -- The UN education agency, UNESCO, says that the bombing of a primary school during the US and Israeli military attacks on Iran on Saturday constitutes a grave violation of humanitarian law.

  • Foreign Ministry Spokesperson's Remarks on the Killing of Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei PRC MofA 01 Mar 2026
  • Foreign Ministry Spokesperson's Remarks on the Killing of Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei Global Times 01 Mar 2026 -- Q: It's reported that Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei was killed in the military strikes launched by the U.S. and Israel. What is China's comment?
  • Chinese FM urges immediate halt to military operations, return to talks on Iran situation Global Times 01 Mar 2026 -- Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi on Sunday said China's position on the situation in Iran is as follows: an immediate cessation of military operations, a prompt return to dialogue and negotiations, and a joint opposition to unilateral actions.
  • U.S., Israeli strikes on Iran during negotiations "unacceptable": Chinese FM Global Times 01 Mar 2026 -- It is unacceptable for the United States and Israel to launch strikes on Iran during the Iran-U.S. negotiations, Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi said during a phone conversation with his Russian counterpart Sergei Lavrov on Sunday.
  • China 'strongly condemns' US-Israeli assassination of Iran's Leader Press TV 01 Mar 2026 -- China has strongly condemned the assassination of Leader of the Islamic Revolution, Ayatollah Seyyed Ali Khamenei, by the United States and Israel, with its foreign ministry describing the aggression as a grave violation of Iran's sovereignty and stability.
  • Chinese Foreign Ministry urges Chinese nationals in Iran to evacuate as soon as possible Global Times 01 Mar 2026 -- The Chinese Foreign Ministry and Chinese embassies and consulates in Iran on Sunday have reminded Chinese citizens in the country to evacuate to safe areas as soon as possible through appropriate means after US and Israel launched military operations against Iran.
  • Chinese envoy voices 'concern and shock' over US-Israel strikes on Iran, urges end to military actions at UN emergence meeting Global Times 01 Mar 2026 -- The UN Security Council held an emergency meeting on the situation in Iran on Saturday local time, during which China's Permanent Representative to the United Nations Fu Cong stated that the US and Israel had brazenly launched military strikes against targets inside Iran, causing a sudden escalation of regional tensions. China expressed deep concern over this.

  • Foreign Ministry statement on the situation around Iran Russia Ministry of Foreign Affairs 01 Mar 2026
  • Condolences over the assassination of Supreme Leader of Iran Ali Khamenei President of Russia 01 Mar 2026 -- Vladimir Putin expressed condolences to President of the Islamic Republic of Iran Masoud Pezeshkian over the assassination of Supreme Leader of Iran Ali Khamenei and members of his family.
  • Putin Sends Condolences to Iran Over Khamenei Killing — Kremlin Sputnik 01 Mar 2026 -- Russian President Vladimir Putin expressed deep condolences to Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian over the killing of Iranian Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei and members of his family, Kremlin Spokesman Dmtry Peskov said.
  • Russia Demands US, Israel Immediately Stop Aggressive Actions Against Iran - Nebenzia Sputnik 01 Mar 2026 -- Russia demands that the United States and Israel immediately stop their aggressive actions against Iran, Russia's Permanent Representative to the UN Vassily Nebenzia said.

  • Hezbollah offers condolences to Iranian nation over Leader's martyrdom Press TV 01 Mar 2026 -- Hezbollah has offered condolences to the Iranian nation and paid tribute to Leader of the Islamic Revolution Ayatollah Seyyed Ali Khamenei, who was martyred by the United States and the Israeli regime in a cowardly strike on his office in Tehran.
  • Islamic Jihad extends 'full solidarity' with Iran following Israeli-American aggression Press TV 01 Mar 2026 -- The Islamic Jihad has extended its "full solidarity" with the Islamic Republic of Iran in the face of the latest act of aggression by the Israeli regime and the United States.

  • Joint Statement on Iran's Missile and Drone Attacks in the Region US Dept. of State 01 Mar 2026 -- The text of the following statement was released by the Governments of the United States of America and Bahrain, Jordan, Kuwait, Qatar, the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, and the United Arab Emirates on the occasion of recent missile and drone attacks launched by the Islamic Republic of Iran across the region.

  • Joint E3 Leaders' Statement on Iran: 1 March 2026 Gov.UK 01 Mar 2026
  • Press statement by Federal Chancellor Merz on the situation in the Middle East - Iranians deserve a better future Germany - Federal Government 01 Mar 2026 -- The USA and Israel have been conducting massive military strikes against Iran since Saturday. Chancellor Merz is in close contact with European partners, Israel and partners in the region. He will discuss the developments with US President Trump in Washington on Tuesday.
  • Joint Statement by the Leaders of France, Germany and the United Kingdom on indiscriminate Iranian attacks on countries in the region. Élysée - President of France 01 Mar 2026
  • PM statement on Iran: 1 March 2026 Gov.UK 01 Mar 2026
  • Summary of the UK Government legal position: The legality of defensive action in respect of Iranian regional attacks Gov.UK 01 Mar 2026 -- The UK condemns in the strongest terms the Iranian regime's reckless and ongoing indiscriminate attacks against countries in the region. Such actions demand a united response to restore peace and security and prevent further escalation of the conflict.
  • Press conference - Sydney Prime Minister of Australia 01 Mar 2026
  • Statement by the Secretary General on the escalation in the Middle East Council of Europe 01 Mar 2026
  • Statement by the High Representative on behalf of the European Union on developments in the Middle East EC/CEU 01 Mar 2026
  • Statement by the High Representative on behalf of the European Union on developments in the Middle East EC/CEU 01 Mar 2026
  • Statements by the Government Spokesman of the Republic of Cyprus after the extraordinary meeting of the National Security Council Republic of Cyprus 01 Mar 2026
  • Tsahkna to EU foreign ministers: pressure on the Iranian regime must continue Estonia MFA 01 Mar 2026
  • Foreign Minister Tsahkna to Israeli Foreign Minister: Khamenei's death has a significant impact on European security Estonia MFA 01 Mar 2026
  • Tsahkna: Khamenei's death gives the Iranian people an opportunity to shape their own future Estonia MFA 01 Mar 2026
  • Statement by the Government Spokesman of the Republic of Cyprus, Mr Konstantinos Letymbiotis Republic of Cyprus 01 Mar 2026
  • Statement on developments in Middle East Poland - Ministry of Foreign Affairs 01 Mar 2026
  • Albares meets with Spanish ambassadors in the Middle East to analyse situation in the region Spain MFA 01 Mar 2026 -- The Minister for Foreign Affairs, European Union and Cooperation, José Manuel Albares, chaired a meeting on Sunday with Spain's ambassadors and chargés d'affaires in Iran, Israel, Palestine, Qatar, Kuwait, Bahrain, Saudi Arabia, the United Arab Emirates, Jordan, Iraq, Syria, Lebanon, Oman, Turkey, Azerbaijan and Armenia to analyse developments in the Middle East and coordinate Spain's consular and diplomatic response.
  • Statement of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of Tajikistan Ministry of Foreign Affairs, Republic of Tajikistan 01 Mar 2026
  • NZ Government Statement on Iran New Zealand Government 01 Mar 2026
  • DPRK Foreign Ministry Spokesperson on Israel's Attack on Iran KCNA 01 Mar 2026 -- A spokesperson for the Foreign Ministry of the DPRK issued the following press statement on Sunday:
  • The General Secretariat of the OIC expresses its condemnation of the Iranian attacks on Oman's Duqm port and an oil tanker off the coast of Oman Organization of Islamic Cooperation (OIC) 01 Mar 2026 -- The General Secretariat of the Organisation of Islamic Cooperation (OIC) has condemned in the strongest terms the Iranian attacks on the Sultanate of Oman's Duqm Port and an oil tanker off its coast, in violation of its sovereignty and territory
  • HE GCCSG: The Brutal Iranian Aggression Against Duqm Port and an Oil Tanker Off the Coast of Oman is Grave Violation of the Sultanate's Sovereignty & Unacceptable Escalation Threatening Regional Security Gulf Cooperation Council 01 Mar 2026 -- His Excellency Mr Jasem Mohamed Albudaiwi, Secretary General of the Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC), expressed his strongest condemnation and denunciation of the brutal Iranian attacks targeting the Duqm commercial port in the brotherly Sultanate of Oman and an oil tanker off its coast.
  • Statement Issued by the 50th Extraordinary Meeting of the Ministerial Council of the Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC) Regarding the Iranian Aggression Against the GCC Gulf Cooperation Council 01 Mar 2026
  • Defense Minister, Bahraini National Security Advisor Affirm Joint Stance Against Iranian Aggression SPA 01 Mar 2026
  • HRH the Crown Prince Receives Call from European Commission President Affirming Solidarity with Saudi Arabia SPA 01 Mar 2026
  • HRH the Crown Prince, Greek Prime Minister Discuss Repercussions of Regional Military Escalation on Global Security SPA 01 Mar 2026
  • HRH the Crown Prince, Algerian President Discuss Regional Escalation; Algeria Affirms Solidarity with the Kingdom SPA 01 Mar 2026
  • HRH the Crown Prince, Chairman of Sudanese Transitional Sovereignty Council Discuss Regional Military Escalation SPA 01 Mar 2026
  • HRH the Crown Prince, Turkish President Discuss Regional Military Escalation; Ankara Affirms Support for Saudi Measures SPA 01 Mar 202
  • Ministry of Foreign Affairs Summons Iranian Ambassador Following Attacks SPA 01 Mar 2026 -- The Ministry of Foreign Affairs summoned Iranian Ambassador to Saudi Arabia Alireza Enayati in response to the blatant Iranian attacks against the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia and several neighboring countries
  • Saudi Arabia Condemns Iranian Attack on Oman SPA 01 Mar 2026 -- The Kingdom of Saudi Arabia condemns and denounces in the strongest terms the blatant Iranian aggression against the Sultanate of Oman and Iran's flagrant violation of its sovereignty, affirming the Kingdom's full solidarity with the Sultanate of Oman
  • HRH the Crown Prince, Sultan of Oman Discuss Regional Military Escalation SPA 01 Mar 2026
  • HRH the Crown Prince, Syrian President Discuss Regional Military Escalation SPA 01 Mar 2026
  • Foreign Minister Receives Phone Call from Indian External Affairs Minister SPA 01 Mar 2026
  • Foreign Minister, Italian Counterpart Discuss Regional Developments, Condemn Iranian Attacks SPA 01 Mar 202
  • Foreign Minister, Palestine Vice President Condemn Iranian Attacks SPA 01 Mar 2026 -- Minister of Foreign Affairs Prince Faisal bin Farhan bin Abdullah received a phone call from Vice President of the State of Palestine Hussein Al Sheikh, during which they discussed the latest developments and their serious repercussions on the region
  • HRH the Crown Prince Receives Phone Call from US President Condemning Blatant Missile Attacks Against Saudi Arabia SPA 01 Mar 2026 -- His Royal Highness Prince Mohammed bin Salman bin Abdulaziz Al Saud, Crown Prince and Prime Minister, received a phone call today from US President Donald Trump, who expressed the United States' condemnation of the blatant missile attacks against the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, which were countered by Saudi air defenses
  • HRH the Crown Prince, German Chancellor Discuss Iranian Attacks on the Kingdom and Arab Nations SPA 01 Mar 2026

  • At Least 9 Dead In Clashes Outside US Consulate In Karachi During Demonstration Over Khamenei's Death RFE/RL 01 Mar 2026 -- At least nine protesters have been killed and 32 injured in clashes after hundreds of Pakistan's pro-Iran Shi'a Muslims, angry over the death of Iranian Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, stormed the US Consulate in the port city of Karachi.

  • Khamenei's death to provoke fierce retaliation, potentially draw US into escalation it may struggle to control: Chinese expert Global Times 01 Mar 2026 -- Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei was killed in his office on Saturday morning during US-Israeli air strikes, media reported. Iran announced 40 days of mourning and vowed to revenge, warning "the most devastating offensive operation in the history of Iran's armed forces" is set to begin, according to Iranian media.
  • General Jack Keane Says US-Israeli Operation Aims to Dismantle Iranian Leadership RFE/RL 01 Mar 2026 -- General Jack Keane, a retired four-star general and former Vice Chief of Staff of the U.S. Army, says the US-Israeli military campaign launched against Iran on February 28 is a calculated effort to dismantle the Islamic Republic's political and military architecture.

    Operation Iron Swords / Operation Al-Aqsa Flood | Operation Northern Arrows | Giddeon's Chariots

  • Justice on the move: Mobile courts offer hope for communities in South Sudan UN News 01 Mar 2026 -- Travelling more than 200 kilometres (124 miles) from Yambio, the capital of Western Equatoria State in southwestern South Sudan, a team of justice experts escorted by United Nations peacekeepers moved slowly along rough, dusty roads, determined to reach communities that have waited years for their day in court.

    • Other Conflicts

  • PLA naval, air units enter so-called 'joint patrol' area of Philippines, co-opted countries during readiness patrols near Huangyan Dao: media Global Times 01 Mar 2026 -- Naval and air units of the Southern Theater Command of the Chinese People's Liberation Army (PLA) conducted readiness patrols in the territorial sea and airspace of China's Huangyan Dao and its surrounding areas on Saturday.

  • Proposed agenda unveiled for annual session of China's top political advisory body PRC MND 01 Mar 2026 -- The main agenda proposed for the upcoming fourth session of the 14th National Committee of the Chinese People's Political Consultative Conference (CPPCC), China's top political advisory body, was unveiled on Sunday.

  • The President spoke by phone with the Polish leader President of the Republic of Lithuania 01 Mar 2026 -- On Monday, President Gitanas Nausėda had a telephone conversation with Estonian President Alar Karis.
  • Gitanas Nausėda held a phone call with the President of Finland President of the Republic of Lithuania 01 Mar 2026 -- On Sunday evening, President Gitanas Nausėda spoke by phone with the President of Finland, Alexander Stubb.
  • The President discussed the situation in the Middle East with the Latvian leader President of the Republic of Lithuania 01 Mar 2026 -- On Sunday, Gitanas Nausėda had a telephone conversation with Latvian President Edgars Rinkēvičs to discuss security challenges in the Middle East, Russia's war against Ukraine and international efforts to achieve a just and lasting peace, as well as the situation in Belarus.
